occupation: Head of Sales | Direct at Elevision
headline: Head of Direct Sales | Helping Brands Grow and Scale Their Businesses Through The Power of Digital Out Of Home (DOOH)
summary:
As a media & sales professional, I'm passionate about building strong, long-lasting, transparent relationships with my clients. I pride myself on putting the client first, using knowledge and initiative to develop effective solutions that help them grow and scale their businesses.

Elevision specialises in Digital-out-Home-Media (DOOH), delivering cutting-edge, dynamic content to premium urban communities. With a network of over 1,400 digital displays and a combined monthly unique reach of over 400,000, we give advertisers unparalleled access to the region's most affluent and influential consumers. Through state-of-the-art technology and an in-house creative team, we enable our clients to tailor their advertising campaigns to maximise relevance, impact and results.

In addition to our elevator-based media and large format DOOH screens across The Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC), Elevision has recently launched two new business units; Elevision+ and Elevision Create.

Elevision+ is a new range of digital product offerings that focuses on programmatic, data analytics, and mobile integration. All of Elevision's inventory is now available to be purchased programmatically via several DSPs. With the addition of a data analytics platform, Elevision is now able to provide tools and insights during the campaign planning stages, resulting in even more targeted and contextually relevant buys.

Elevision Create is a digital content creation services unit. As DOOH and digital continue to grow, captivating content is essential in capturing interest and driving conversion. Through Elevision Create, clients get nothing short of original, innovative, and engaging content.

experiences.title: Head of Sales | Direct
experiences.description:
Elevision operates a leading Out-of-Home (OOH) network with 2,500 elevator and lobby screens across 892 residential and commercial buildings in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, delivering over 477million monthly impressions.

Also, as the exclusive media and advertising partner of the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC), Dubai Design District (d3) and One Central, we operate a high-impact network of 300 digital screens throughout the three districts, offering unparalleled access to a premium, high-net-worth, and brand-savvy audience.

For any sales-related inquiries, feel free to reach out at alex@elevision.com.

experiences.title: Recruitment Consultant
experiences.description:
Working for Spring Personnel as a Recruitment Consultant required me to use an array of sales, business development, marketing techniques and networking in order to attract business from target companies.

•	Consistently building and growing relationships with both clients and candidates.
•	Gaining a thorough understanding of client companies such as what they do, what they look for along with their culture and working environment.
•	Headhunting suitable candidates who match client’s requirements and may already be in permanent positions.
•	 Negotiating candidate salaries and agency fees with potential clients.
•	Offering consultative advice to both clients and candidates

experiences.title: Sales/Accounts Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for the account management and promotion of IT products and services within the SME and educational market. I was also directly accountable for creating pipeline business to maintain new opportunities and cash flow. Business management and lead generation are other key areas in which I was solely responsible for.

experiences.title: Store Manager
experiences.description: As a store manager I was responsible for management and motivation of the team, order management and ensuring the store hits ever increasing sales targets. In additon to this I was also responsible for people management, calculating targets, pipeline management and reporting, together with the production of in depth development programmes and sales techniques to enable the team to achieve their objectives. During my time at Vodafone, I have learnt in depth interviewing techniques such as CBI questioning plus HR processes and how to drive staff loyalty.
